description: Fetch trending AI models from Replicate's Explore page. Returns models from featured (curated trending) and latest (newest arrivals) sections. The official models section is available on request. Each model includes owner, name, description, run count, official badge, and cover image. No authentication required.

parameters.name: sections
parameters.description: Comma-separated section names to include: featured, official, latest. Defaults to all three.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum models to return per section (1-50). Defaults to 12.
